message.content:
@startuml
title Search Product by ID

actor "User" as User
participant "«main» Main" as Main
participant "«frame» MainMenu" as MainMenu
participant "«dialog» ProductReportDialog" as ProductReportDialog
participant "«DAO» ProductDatabaseDAO" as ProductDatabaseDAO
participant "Database" as Database
participant "«domain» Product :product" as Product
participant "SimpleListModel :model" as SimpleListModel

User -> MainMenu: clicks 'View Products'
activate MainMenu
MainMenu -> ProductReportDialog: «create»
activate ProductReportDialog
ProductReportDialog -> ProductDatabaseDAO: «create»
activate ProductDatabaseDAO
note right of ProductReportDialog: as shown in 'View Products' diagram
end note
ProductReportDialog --> User: list of products displayed
deactivate ProductDatabaseDAO
deactivate ProductReportDialog
deactivate MainMenu

User -> ProductReportDialog: user types productID into field; clicks "Search"
activate ProductReportDialog
ProductReportDialog -> ProductDatabaseDAO: findProd(productID)
activate ProductDatabaseDAO
ProductDatabaseDAO -> Database: search product by ID
activate Database
Database --> ProductDatabaseDAO: resultSet
deactivate Database
ProductDatabaseDAO -> ProductDatabaseDAO: extract product details from ResultSet into variables
ProductDatabaseDAO -> Product: «construct»
ProductDatabaseDAO -> Product: set products fields from variables
deactivate ProductDatabaseDAO

ProductReportDialog -> SimpleListModel: «construct»
activate SimpleListModel
ProductReportDialog -> SimpleListModel: updateItems(products)
activate SimpleListModel
SimpleListModel -> ProductReportDialog: jList.setModel(model)
deactivate SimpleListModel
ProductReportDialog --> User: product displayed
deactivate ProductReportDialog

@enduml
